coverage_note: The bundled ACE2 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from ACE2 renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000130234: ACE2 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: ACE2 findings should be read against renin-angiotensin peptide processing, carboxypeptidase activity, cardiopulmonary vascular biology, and viral spike receptor biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.
rs2285666 is curated as a ACE2 marker for Renin-angiotensin system biology, Cardiopulmonary and vascular research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

ACE2 spike-binding model is curated as a ACE2 marker for Renin-angiotensin system biology, Cardiopulmonary and vascular research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
